title: SENIOR QUALITY ASSURANCE EXECUTIVE
description:
Abiraame Popular Jewellers (S) Pte Ltd, is a trusted shopping destination for Gold & Diamond Jewellery in Singapore. We are reputed organization in Little India, serving Singaporeans for more than a decade. We do follow fair practice in recruiting staffs for our firm.

We are young and growing company and hence, we are looking for people who are versatile in their work. Their main task is to ensure the high-quality stock is available in right-quantity in the shop, as per customer’s needs in right-time. Being in Jewelry field, they need to do small ornament repairs or quality check work on their own.

Currently we are looking for SENIOR QUALITY ASSURANCE EXECUTIVE for our firm to take Quality Control of Jewelry Management. He / She plays a crucial role in maintaining quality of company’s jewelry stock inventory.

Roles & Responsibilities:

· Final Inspection of fine goods such as finished gold jewelry, Diamond jewelry, gemstones, etc. to ensure that all internal specifications and standards are met.

· Determining, negotiating, and agreeing on in-house quality procedures, standards and/or specifications to maintain quality jewelry in Showroom.

· Checking order/repairs items to its specific requirements and make sure the finishing works is performed exactly.

· Documenting inspection results and entering error data into a computer database.

· Notifying appropriate personnel for discrepancies in orders

· Setting customer service standards

· Reviewing and addressing customer requests efficiently with our sales team

· Specifying quality requirements of Jewelry with suppliers

· Ensuring that manufacturing processes comply with standards at both national and international level

· Working with operating staff to establish procedures, quality standards, systems, and procedures

· Partner with sales team and management to identify methods to improve overall servicing quality.

· Acting as a catalyst for change and improvement in performance/quality

· Additional projects or duties as mandated by Management.

Requirements:

· Minimum Bachelor of Chemistry or equivalent.

· Must have at least 10 years of jewelry quality control experience. Little India sales experience is preferred, to understand Singapore customer’s jewelry interest and Gold, Diamond jewellery quality.

· Must have at least 10 years of quality assurance experience in maintaining quality standards in gold jewelry management.

· Advanced level computer skills

· Ability to check the quality of jewelry and obtain data from testing machine.

· Knowledge of Gold jewelry, diamonds, precious stones, semi-precious stones, and jewelry manufacturing.

· Strong organizational and communication skills.

· Ability to multi-task, set priorities and meet strict deadlines.

· Demonstrates time management skills.

· Using logic and reasoning to identify solutions to problems.

· Ability to lead, motivate, coach, and teach others.

· Optional to work on Sundays & Public Holidays.

** We Regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified***
